scripts.studio: corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos build && corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos-web build && corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos-web start
scripts.studio:build: corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos build && corepack pnpm --filter @actalk/inkos-web build
scripts.release: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' publish --no-git-checks
